import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create Send-To"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/sendto"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Start the signing process by uploading the PDF document `content` and
assigning it a `title`.

### Limited lifetime

> Send-To objects and its related Documents and SignatureRequests are only
guaranteed for a **limited lifetime.** 
  
- Send-To request that dont get claimed by a user, so where a user does not
add the document to the list of his documents to sign, will be deleted
automatically after one day.
    
- Send-To objects and its related Documents and SignatureRequest objects in
general, independant of its status, will be deleted automatically after 90
days.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
